features: Waterproof Shaving System - Designed to be 100% Waterproof. Use your favourite wet-shave foams or gels; take your shaving routine into the shower with you and enjoy easy cleaning between uses.
Stubble Styler Accessory - For a less close shave; create a 3-day stubble look using the Stubble Styler on the R6 Style Series Aqua Rotary.
Pop Up Comfort Trim Detailer - Want to neaten up your sideburns Trim away stray hairs The R6 Style Series Aqua Rotary has you covered with its Pop Up Comfort Trim Detailer.
Up to 60 Minutes Cordless Use with 5 Minute Quick Charge - Its 2x 3-Stage LED Indicators will let you know when your battery is running low.
3 Year Manufacturer's Guarantee - Plus 1 extra year when you register the product online.
description: Product Description Want the refreshing feeling of a wet shave but the convenience of a dry shave? The R6 Style Series Aqua Rotary lets you do both. Designed to be 100% Waterproof you can Shower, Shave and Style with ease and less irritation. The Ergonomic Grip provides both comfort and control whilst the 60-Minute Cordless Usage Time means you can enjoy multiple shaves. Directions 1. Charge the shaver. 2. Wet or dry the shaving area. 3. Apply shaving foam or gel (optional). 4. Move the shaver over the skin in circular motions. 5. Rinse the shaver under running water. 6. Dry the shaver before storing. Safety Warning Always keep the shaver away from water while charging and avoid using it in the shower. Always dry the shaver before storing to prevent water damage and bacterial growth. See more

specifications_table.Special features: ‎Dual Track Blades, Flexing blades and pivoting neck, Stubble Styler Head Guard, Waterproof, Waterproof Shaving System for wet & dry shaving
